generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance MotorPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor position encoder on the permanent‑magnet synchronous motor, providing motor current I_M and angle."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderStream
]

instance GearboxPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Gearbox position encoder behind the gearbox, providing output angle."
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxEncoderStream
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction – DataTransmitted
instance MotorEncoderStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorPositionEncoder
]

instance GearboxEncoderStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxPositionEncoder
]

// C10: Data
instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor current I_M transmitted via MQTT."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler, WebDashboardEnabler
]

instance MotorAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor shaft angle transmitted via MQTT."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler, WebDashboardEnabler
]

instance GearboxAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured gearbox output angle transmitted via MQTT."
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxEncoderStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler, WebDashboardEnabler
]

instance DerivedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Torque derived from motor current and motor parameters."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler, WebDashboardEnabler
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity calculated from angle data."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler, WebDashboardEnabler
]

instance AngularAccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular acceleration derived from velocity data."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler, WebDashboardEnabler
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance SysMLAxisModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML block definition and internal block diagrams of the robot axis."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLToolEnabler
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink Coulomb‑Viscous friction model used for parameter identification."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink Stribeck friction model used for parameter identification."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink Dahl friction model used for parameter identification."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink LuGre friction model used for parameter identification."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance MQTTBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker for real‑time transport of sensor measurements to the digital twin."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTransportService
]

instance MATLABSimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink environment executing friction models (Coulomb‑Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, LuGre)."
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, VisualizationDashboardService
]

instance WebDashboardEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Web‑based dashboard for visualizing measured vs simulated data and friction identification results."
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationDashboardService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShellEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for integration of engineering and simulation models."
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelIntegrationService
]

instance SysMLToolEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML tool for structural modeling of the robot axis."
    DTDFVocab:enables StructuralModelingService
]

// C6: Services
instance DataTransportService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Transport of sensor data via MQTT to the digital twin."
    DTDFVocab:provides DataTransportInsight
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Derives static, kinetic, and viscous friction parameters from measured torque and velocity data."
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionParametersInsight, ModelUpdateAction
]

instance VisualizationDashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Displays measured vs simulated torque and angular velocity, and shows identified friction parameters."
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance StructuralModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Creates and maintains SysML structural models of the robot axis."
    DTDFVocab:provides StructuralModelInsight
]

instance ModelIntegrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrates engineering and simulation models using the Asset Administration Shell."
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelIntegrationInsight
]

// C17: Insights / Actions
instance FrictionParametersInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Derivation of static, kinetic, and viscous friction parameters for the robot axis."
]

instance ModelUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic update of friction model parameters in the robot controller to improve motion accuracy."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visual comparison of measured and simulated torque and angular velocity data."
]

instance DataTransportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Successful real‑time transmission of sensor data via MQTT."
]

instance StructuralModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "SysML structural model accurately represents the robot axis components."
]

instance ModelIntegrationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Engineering and simulation models are coherently linked through the Asset Administration Shell."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A digital shadow composed of purpose (friction derivation), asset (MABI axis), sources (sensor streams), processing components (simulation models), and data traces, all linked according to the Digital Shadow Reference Model to provide a coherent virtual representation of the physical axis."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Traceability of each data point to its origin and processing chain; validation through comparison of simulated friction‑less behavior with measured data to quantify friction losses and adjust models in real time."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Sensor data are transmitted from the robot to the digital shadow using MQTT; the digital shadow is linked to the physical asset via Asset Administration Shell (AAS) specifications."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Uses the Industry 4.0 Asset Administration Shell (AAS) standard, SysML for model exchange, and MQTT as a standard messaging protocol."
]
